title: dicorynia paraensis var. breviflora
intro: Dicorynia paraensis var. breviflora, also known as the Para rubber tree, is a variety of the Dicorynia paraensis plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dicorynia paraensis var. breviflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, and topical creams.
